threadName: Create a simple Pong game in

messages.content: Create a simple Pong game using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. The player should control the left paddle with their mouse and arrow keys up/down, the right paddle is the computer. Make sure the game includes a bouncing ball, a scoreboard and collision detection for paddles and walls.

pong.html.name: pong.html
pong.html.value:
Pong Game

0 : 0

Move: Mouse Up/Down or ↑ ↓ keys
